MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES (Court Call):

Nicholas H. Van Parys, (213) 403-1800 ext. 103 - appearing on behalf of plaintiffs Darrell Simon and Lisa Billeaudeu-Simon.

Byron B. Mauss, (714) 427-7000 - appearing on behalf of defendant CalCap Lending, LLC and FCI Lender Services, Inc.

Michael Taurek, (949) 271-8700 - appearing on behalf of 1Sharpe Opportunity Intermediate Trust.

After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction (Per Order Filed 12/16/20) is DENIED. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
